description: Style Note Heir by paris hilton is a Aromatic fragrance for men. Heir was launched in 2006. Now add this classy and modern aromatic fragrance that'll give your personality a crisp makeover. Wear it anywhere for a brilliantly classy effect! Product DetailsHeir by Paris Hilton  features a blend of crisp bergamot, fir balsam, mandarin leaves, elemi, patchouli, brushed suede, lavender, iron musk, sandalwood, and amberCautionDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying in eyesQuantity50 ml
